description: Average score by well for one selected fleet and pad.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  s.name AS well_name,
  ROUND(AVG(s.composite_score)::numeric, 1) AS average_score,
  COUNT(*)::bigint AS stage_count,
  MIN(s.composite_score) AS lowest_score,
  CASE
    WHEN AVG(s.composite_score) >= 70 THEN '#2A9D6F'
    WHEN AVG(s.composite_score) >= 45 THEN '#E6A23C'
    ELSE '#D9534F'
  END AS color
FROM featurestore:merged_stage_execution_scores_v1 s
WHERE s.formula_version = :formula_version
AND s.normalization_version = :normalization_version
  AND s.fleet_name = :fleet_name
  AND s.pad_name = :pad_name
GROUP BY s.name
ORDER BY average_score, s.name
) q
